examples: The juveniles feeding on unenriched artemia nauplii have a lower growth rates and survival rates.
Third stage zoae(Z_3)could prey on the copepods nauplii, and the feeding amount was increased with the increasing density of the nauplii(P<0.01).
Some most essential factors such as nutrient value, hatching quality, length of nauplii, in the quality evaluation of Artemia cysts are reported in this paper.
